data.title: 官方 Instagram 账号正式上线
data.summary: We're excited to announce the launch of our official Instagram account! 💌 https://forum.nexon.com/bl
data.body:
We're excited to announce the launch of our official Instagram account!

💌 https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=2974105

Stay connected with Sensei life, and don’t miss a single moment from Kivotos!
Let’s create new memories together – one post at a time. 💙

#BlueArchive
